# cloak

> Local-first, reversible PII redaction for LLM prompts. Masks PII before it
> reaches a model and restores it in the response. Library, CLI, MCP server, and
> a round-trip reverse proxy. Core is dependency-free; detection runs locally.

Pipeline: detect (regex + optional local NER + optional local LLM) → resolve
(overlap merge, code-span skip, allow/deny) → replace (placeholder / pseudonym /
redact / hash) → reversible Vault → restore on the response.

## Docs

- [README](README.md): overview, install, quickstart for every surface
- [Architecture](docs/architecture.md): pipeline, components, data flow
- [Policy reference](docs/policy.md): CloakPolicy fields, profiles, entity types
- [Threat model](docs/threat-model.md): trust boundaries and limitations
- [Roadmap](ROADMAP.md): status and gap analysis
- [Contributing](CONTRIBUTING.md): dev setup and checks
- [Security](SECURITY.md): reporting + handling sensitive data

## Examples

- [examples/quickstart.py](examples/quickstart.py): mask → restore round trip (offline)
- [examples/strategies_and_profiles.py](examples/strategies_and_profiles.py): strategies + profiles
- [examples/wrap_openai.py](examples/wrap_openai.py): wrap the OpenAI SDK (local Ollama by default)
- [examples/proxy_quickstart.md](examples/proxy_quickstart.md): run the reverse proxy
- [examples/mcp_usage.md](examples/mcp_usage.md): use cloak as an MCP server

## Key source

- `src/cloak/engine.py`: the Cloak orchestrator (mask_text / mask_messages / unmask)
- `src/cloak/policy.py`: CloakPolicy + from_profile/from_file/from_env
- `src/cloak/patterns.py`, `src/cloak/validators.py`: regex recognizers + checksums
- `src/cloak/detectors/`: regex, phone, ner (gliner/spacy), llm (ollama)
- `src/cloak/strategies/`: placeholder, pseudonym, redact, hash
- `src/cloak/vault.py`: original↔token map, restore, encrypted persistence
- `src/cloak/evaluate.py` + `eval/gold.txt`: precision/recall harness
- `src/cloak/proxy/`, `src/cloak/mcp_server.py`: proxy + MCP surfaces

## Commands

- `cloak scan|mask|unmask <file>`: detect / mask / restore
- `cloak eval eval/gold.txt --detectors regex`: measure precision/recall
- `cloak proxy --upstream <url>`: round-trip masking proxy
- `cloak serve-mcp`: MCP server over stdio
